Description:
REQUIRES CD2 beta update 15 (UPDATED), MEV v5.4 AND DEA b00.3.3+. Recommended VEA. Interstellar, shortened as IS, is a spin off of FC_b23 with some interesting twists on modded enemies.
    v1.10
  - Revert ED change for Glyphid Rat as they spawn as Grunts in mission, not Swarmer.
Name: Interstellar v1.10
